Our Core Product

Anti-Slip
Rubber Mats

Our anti-slip rubber mats are manufactured from high-grade recycled rubber granulate, delivering exceptional friction between cargo and loading surfaces. Used by freight professionals across Europe on truck floors, flatbeds, container floors and loading docks.

MaterialRecycled rubber granulate (PU-bonded)
Friction (μ)≥ 0.6 — tested to VDI 2700
Thickness3 mm – 20 mm available
FormatsRoll, sheet, custom cut-to-size
Temp. range−40°C to +80°C
CertificationsEN 12195-1, VDI 2700
Request a Quote →
Full Range

All Securing
Solutions

Everything you need to secure cargo correctly — from rubber matting to certified chains.

Most Popular
Lashing Straps

Ratchet and cam buckle straps in all widths and load ratings. Compliant with EN 12195-2. Available in standard and custom lengths.

25 mm · 35 mm · 50 mm 500 kg – 5,000 kg LC EN 12195-2
Request Quote →
Heavy Duty
Securing Chains

Grade 80 and Grade 100 lashing chains for heavy machinery, vehicles and oversized loads. Complete with hooks and tensioners.

Grade 80 & 100 7 mm – 16 mm EN 12195-3
Request Quote →
Edge & Load Protection

Corner protectors, edge guards, dunnage bags and load binders. Complete your securing system and protect cargo surfaces.

Corner protectors Dunnage bags Load binders
Request Quote →

How It Works

Quote to
Delivery

We handle B2B orders fast. From your first enquiry to products on your dock.

01
Submit your requirement

Tell us your cargo type, vehicle type and quantities. Use the form below or call us directly — we respond within 24 hours.

02
Receive a tailored quote

We recommend the right product, thickness and format for your specific load securing needs. No generic catalogue — real advice.

03
Confirm & we ship

Orders are picked from EU stock. Standard delivery 2–5 business days across Europe. Pallet and bulk quantities available.

04
Cargo stays secured

Our products meet EN 12195 standards. Your loads stay in place, your fleet stays compliant, your drivers stay safe.

Industries We Serve

Built for Every
Transport Sector

From flatbed haulage to container shipping — our products are used across the full spectrum of freight and logistics.

🚛
Road Freight

Curtainsider, flatbed and box trucks. Anti-slip flooring and strap kits for daily general cargo operations.

🚢
Sea Container

Anti-slip mats for container floors, dunnage bags for load filling. Protection for long-haul ocean freight.

🏗️
Construction

Heavy machinery transport, steel beams, pipes. Grade 100 chains and corner protectors for oversize loads.

🚂
Rail & Intermodal

Securing solutions for rail wagons, RoRo and intermodal units. Products certified to international standards.

Why Concrete Matz

Serious Products
for Serious
Operators

We are not a catalogue supplier. We understand load securing — and we help you get it right.

📋
EN 12195 Certified Range

All lashing products meet the European load securing standard. Fully documented for compliance and insurance purposes.

⚡
Fast EU Delivery

Stock held in Europe. Orders ship within 24–48 hours. No waiting weeks for sea freight from Asia.

🎯
Expert Product Advice

Tell us your cargo and vehicle type — we specify the right product, quantity and thickness. Free of charge.

📦
Bulk & Pallet Orders

Competitive pricing for fleet operators, logistics companies and distributors. Volume discounts available.
